decisions.title_en: Cursor in talks to raise $2B at $50B valuation, Nvidia joining round
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Cursor previously covered around $29B post-money; this doubles valuation in 6 months and adds Nvidia as strategic investor.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic launches Claude Design; Figma stock falls 7%
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First major horizontal product launch from Anthropic beyond core Claude; direct threat to Figma/Canva.

decisions.title_en: White House pushing to give federal agencies access to Claude Mythos; Amodei meets Bessent/Wiles at WH
decisions.reason: Previously published on 04-07 ('AI first discovered thousands of zero-days'). New info: OMB email to cabinets setting up protections to use Mythos, Dario Amodei meets Susie Wiles, Treasury Scott Bessent, and Cyber Director Cairncross at the WH. Policy-level development distinct from original disclosure.

decisions.title_en: Cerebras files for IPO same day OpenAI commits $20B+ and takes warrant stake
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Dual event: IPO filing under CBRS ticker + $20-30B OpenAI commitment convertible into up to 10% equity.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches GPT-Rosalind for life sciences
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First OpenAI vertical model; topped BixBench, beat GPT-5.4 on 6/11 LABBench2 tasks; Amgen, Moderna, Thermo Fisher as launch customers.

decisions.title_en: Meta raises Quest 3/3S prices citing AI-driven RAM shortage
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. First consumer hardware company to pass AI data-center demand through to end-consumer prices. Symbolic of AI capex spillover.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI updates Agents SDK with model-native harness and native sandbox execution
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. New sandbox, configurable memory, skills, AGENTS.md, apply_patch tools; subagents and code mode coming.

decisions.title_en: Reports surface on Altman pushing OpenAI to fund Helion and Stoke Space, where he holds stakes
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Different from altman-house-firebombing. Shareholder dissent surfaces ahead of $850B IPO; Bret Taylor named possible alternate CEO.

decisions.title_en: Stellantis and Microsoft sign 5-year AI partnership covering 100+ AI initiatives and global cyberdefense center
decisions.reason: story_key not seen in lookback. Major automotive-cloud AI deal, Azure migration targeting 60% datacenter footprint cut, 20k Copilot licenses.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic fielding VC offers at up to $800B valuation
decisions.reason: Not in lookback under this key, but $800B valuation story widely published 04-14/04-15 (outside our 7-day window for this specific key but inside recent news cycle). Closely related to already-published anthropic-revenue-surpasses-openai on 04-11/04-13. No new public development on 04-17/04-18; keeping out to avoid recap.

decisions.title_en: Microsoft commits $10B in Japan AI infrastructure 2026-2029
decisions.reason: event_date 2026-04-03 is 15 days old (>5 day limit).
